title: Chicken Tea Sandwich
description: A classic British tea time favorite featuring tender and juicy chicken.
instructions: 1. In a medium bowl, whisk together mayonnaise and a pinch of salt.
2. Add shredded lettuce, sliced tomato, and sliced cucumber to the bowl and mix gently.
3. Cut the cooked chicken into thin slices and add to the bowl, mixing gently.
4. Spread a layer of butter on two slices of white bread.
5. Spoon the chicken mixture onto one slice of bread and top with the other slice.
6. Cut the sandwich into quarters and serve.
